rulings.Case Title: MARINE SERVICE VS ASTORIA METAL CORP
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Stay Pending Arbitration And To Dismiss Action; Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, SEPTEMBER 25, 2007, LINE 1. DEFENDANT DOUGLAS WATSON'S Motion To Vacate Stay Pending Arbitration And To Dismiss Action (Request For Judicial Notice) IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO EXERCISE REASONABLE DILIGENCE IN ARBITRATING THE DISPUTE. BOUTWELL V KAISER FOUNDATION HEALTH PLAN (1988) 206 CAL. APP. 3D 1371. =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Case Title: ONE CLARENCE PLACE OWNERS ASSOCIATION, A CALIFORNI VS. MARTIN PROPERTIES, LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, SEPTEMBER 25, 2007, LINE 2. CROSS-DEFENDANT WESTCO ROOFING CO., INC.'S AMENDED DEMURRER TO CROSS-COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, TEN DAYS TO ANSWER. WHERE THE ESSENTIAL FACTS ALLEGE A VALID CAUSE OF ACTION, THE DEMURRER FAILS. HERE THE COMPLAINT STATES A CONTRACTUAL CLAIM AND BY REFERENCE TO THE COMPLAINT, THE PLACE WHERE THE WORK WAS DONE AND THE CROSS-DEFENDANT IS ALLEGED TO BE A SUBCONTRACTOR, IT IS NOT UNCERTAIN. CROSS-COMPLAINANT MAY PLEAD ALTERNATIVE THEORIES OF LIABILITY AND THAT IS WHAT THE FOURTH THROUGH SEVENTH CAUSES OF ACTION ARE. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: MALINKA MOYE VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, SEPTEMBER 25, 2007, LINE 3. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. AMENDED NOTICE OF DEMURRER FILED ON AUGUST 31, 2007 AND RENOTICED FOR OCTOBER 2, 2007. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: DAVID LEVINE VS. CLEATUS POMAZAL-SMITH et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion To Recover Attys' Fees And Costs; Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, SEPTEMBER 25, 2007, LINE 5. DEFENDANTS CLEATUS POMAZAL-SMITH AND DR. SCOTT SMITH'S Motion To Recover ATTORNEY'S Fees And Costs (Request For Judicial Notice) IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT IS AWARDED $33,159.12 IN FEES AND $471.85 COSTS. FEES REDUCED FOR SETTLEMENT WORK AND PREPARATION OF FEE APPLICATION. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: NEW YORK CHOCOLATE & CONFECTIONS COMPANY, A VS. OUSMANNE GBANE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reconsider Order Granting Cross-Defts' Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, SEPTEMBER 25, 2007, LINE 6. CROSS-COMPLAINANT HOUSMANN BANET'S Motion To Reconsider Order Granting Cross-DEFENDANTS' Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Cross-Complaint IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 31, 2007. MOVING PARTY TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR PAPERS ALONG WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE. =(302/PJM)

rulings.Case Title: RAFAEL HERNANDEZ VS. STANFORD K. WONG et al
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, SEPTEMBER 25, 2007, LINE 7. DEFENDANT ROBERT EVANS' DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED, TEN DAYS TO ANSWER. THE AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUFFICIENT TO ALLOW PLAINTIFF TO PURSUE THE CLAIM AGAINST EVANS, WHO IS ALLEGED TO HAVE KNOWN ABOUT AND TO HAVE CONSPIRED WITH WONG IN THE ALLEGED FRAUDULENT SCHEME. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Demurrer To The Complaint Of Pltf
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON TUESDAY, SEPTEMBER 25, 2007, LINE 9. DEFENDANTS VALLEY OF CALIFORNIA. INC., D.B.A. COLDWELL BANKER TRI, MICHAEL SCHROEDER, CHRISTOPHER GARLINGTON AND JOEL WARE'S Demurrer To The Complaint Of PLAINTIFF: THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED. THE CASE IS TRANSFERRED TO THE PROBATE DEPARTMENT WHICH HAS EXCLUSIVE JURISDICTION OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. =(302/PJM)
